name: Secrets of the Kohinoor
overview: The stories of multiple rulers and their insatiable desire for the Kohinoor which led to significant and very bloody wars, triggered agonising mind games, and empowered rulers and ruined dynasties whilst exploring stories of powerful emperors whose lives intertwined with the diamond in unfathomable ways.

trailers.title: India's Untold Story : Secrets Of Kohinoor Ft. Manoj Bajpayee
